creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: suspended->closed

We no longer plan to do bulk imports from OpenBSD. 

If you want any featues from there, you can work on 
carefully porting them to FreeBSD and then code can 
be included into FreeBSD. 

The previous comment from linimon@ on this PR 
makes sense. We don't want to break rules syntax 
in FreeBSD.
